doc:
Pure-TS port of MPFR's mpfr_clear_overflow (mpfr/src/exceptions.c L160-L166). Three-line C body: `__gmpfr_flags &= MPFR_FLAGS_ALL ^ MPFR_FLAGS_OVERFLOW` -- clear the OVERFLOW bit (bit 1 = 2). C returns void.

The TS port follows the same immutable-API contract used by the rest of the flag family: takes `mask: bigint`, applies the clear-OVERFLOW operation, returns the new flag state as `bigint`. In-library wiring goes through clearFlags(MPFR_FLAGS_OVERFLOW) from src/internal/mpfr/flags.ts.

Class 'misc'. Tag minimums per Rule 7 apply.
divergence_from_c: Three: (1) return void -> bigint (new state); (2) param void -> mask:bigint; (3) mechanism: clearFlags(MPFR_FLAGS_OVERFLOW) or inline `mask & (63n ^ 2n)`.
